title: Navaris Natural Slate Serving Plates - Set of 6 Slate Place Mat Serving Trays - Medium Rectangular Stone Table Mat Serving Platter Tiles - 30 x 20 cm
features: HIGH-QUALITY SLATE: Each of the 6 serving mats is made of attractive high-quality slate. The dark grey stone and simple rectangular shape is aesthetically pleasing as well as practical and safe to eat from. Each piece has a natural cut edge.

NO-SCRATCH PROTECTION: Unlike other stone place mats, the Navaris set of slate mats won't scratch your wooden dining table or kitchen sideboards. Each mat has 6 small pads on the underside so the serving plates won't scratch your surfaces.

DINNER IS SERVED: These place mats can be used to serve up all kinds of food in style. Present a delicious spread of cheese, charcuterie, sushi, desserts or even dinner, so long as it's not with sauce.
A BLANK SLATE: Just like a traditional slate blackboard, the slabs can be written or drawn on with chalk - perfect for labelling a cheese board, for example.
PLEASE NOTE: The slate plates are not suitable for use in the microwave and are not dishwasher safe. Simply wipe clean.
description: Product Description Cool and contemporary natural slate makes up this 6-piece set of place mats from Navaris. Ideal for use as traditional table mats as well as serving platters for cheese boards, cold cuts, sushi and more. The 6 Navaris serving stones are each cut from natural dark grey slate. Each piece is unique and has a raw cut edge for a look that's cool and contemporary. The material is also practical and safe to eat from. Delivery Scope: 6x slate serving plates/place mats Technical Details: Dimensions: 30 x 20 cm Thickness: 4 - 7mm per piece Material: Slate CHALK BOARD Like a traditional black board, the slate tiles can be written on with chalk, so they're ideal for letting guests know what's on offer on the cheese board or tapas tray, for example. NON-SCRATCH Six soft feet on the bottom of each tile ensure the slate mats won't scratch or damage your kitchen worktops, dining table or other surfaces. NOTE Not suitable for use in the dishwasher or microwave. Please wipe clean. About Navaris Selected Designs The Navaris range incorporates an array of styles to provide a catalogue of products that offers functional designs, timeless classics and contemporary furnishings. Useful Navaris products are inspired by everyday living. As a brand, we stand to provide straightforward and simple solutions to everyday situations to help make life that little bit easier. German Based From our hub in Berlin, we use a global network of experts to deliver quality products directly to you. Everything in the Navaris range is specifically tried, tested and developed to meet our rigorous standards.
